meta.reasoning: HEAVY connects three red words cleanly: 'heavy frost' is a standard meteorological term for severe frost; cast iron is famously heavy; marble is one of the heaviest common materials. No strong associations with any blue word (TIME, DICE, PORT, SCALE, OPERA, HOUSE, WATCH, AZTEC) or the assassin (KING). Main neutral risk is PYRAMID (heavy pyramids) but 'heavy pyramid' is not a fixed phrase.
MACHINE targets ROBOT (robot/machine) and JET (jet engine/machine). Safe: no blue words (AZTEC, DICE) or assassin (KING) match 'machine'. Red is trailing 5 vs 2; need multi-word clues each turn.
